spec_match.rationale: Perfect comparative layout showcasing exactly why hardcoded strategies fail on either the clipped edge or the wasteful edge, whereas env() scales perfectly.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive slider updating side-by-side diagrams with custom text reports and warning badges, coupled with a reactive target-row database matrix.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly highlights the engineering trade-offs of printing constraints on the modern web.

edge_cases.rationale: Calculates both oversized wasting constraints and undersized clipping bugs.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus entry and the CSS Environment Variables safe-printable-inset spec reference.

design_system.rationale: Clean grids, color-coded status badges (ok, clip, warn) matching public/styles.css principles.

summary: The printer-compare concept now clears the major reference compliance finding while preserving the interactive comparison of fixed and adaptive print margins.
